description: API lane with NO contract files -- emits NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION (treated as FAILED).

rubric_hints.trigger_reliability: Agent detects absence of openapi.yaml + pact/ + .pact/ → emits NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION
rubric_hints.non_negotiable_adherence: NN#2: lane=api WITHOUT contract tooling MUST emit NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION
rubric_hints.side_effect_correctness: Does NOT invoke /contract-test; does NOT silently skip
rubric_hints.error_propagation: NEEDS_CONTRACT_VALIDATION surfaces in failures[] with INFRASTRUCTURE-level severity
